writers.lyricist: Du Jia Shin/Bottolf L?demel and Nora Skaug/Bottolf Lodemel and Nora Skaug

lyrics.text: I lie awake at night
See things in black and white
I've only got you inside my mind
You know you have made me blind
lyrics.translation: 你知道你让我变得盲目

lyrics.text: I lie awake and pray
That you will look my way
I have all this longing in my heart
I knew it right from the start
Oh my pretty pretty boy I love you
lyrics.translation: 哦，我可爱的男孩，我爱你

lyrics.text: Like I never ever loved no one before you
lyrics.translation: 好像在你之前我从未爱过任何人

lyrics.text: Pretty pretty boy of mine
Just tell me you love me too
Oh my pretty pretty boy I need you
lyrics.translation: 哦，我可爱的男孩，我需要你

lyrics.text: Oh my pretty pretty boy I do
lyrics.translation: 哦，我可爱的男孩，我愿意

lyrics.text: Let me inside
Make me stay right beside you
I used to write your name
And put it in a frame
lyrics.translation: 并把它放在一个框架里

lyrics.text: And sometimes I think I hear you call
lyrics.translation: 有时我想我听到你的呼唤

lyrics.text: Right from my bedroom wall
You stay a little while
And touch me with your smile
And what can I say to make you mine
lyrics.translation: 我能说什么让你成为我的

lyrics.text: To reach out for you in time
Oh my pretty pretty boy I love you
lyrics.translation: 哦，我可爱的男孩，我爱你

lyrics.text: Like I never ever loved no one before you
lyrics.translation: 好像在你之前我从未爱过任何人

lyrics.text: Pretty pretty boy of mine
Just tell me you love me too
Oh my pretty pretty boy I need you
lyrics.translation: 哦，我可爱的男孩，我需要你

lyrics.text: Oh my pretty pretty boy I do
lyrics.translation: 哦，我可爱的男孩，我愿意

lyrics.text: Let me inside
Make me stay right beside you
Oh pretty boy , pretty boy , pretty boy
lyrics.translation: 可爱的男孩，可爱的男孩，可爱的男孩

lyrics.text: Say you love me too
Oh my pretty pretty boy I love you
lyrics.translation: 哦，我漂亮的男孩，我爱你

lyrics.text: Like I never ever loved no one before you
lyrics.translation: 好像在你之前我从未爱过任何人

lyrics.text: Pretty pretty boy of mine
Just tell me you love me too
Oh my pretty pretty boy I need you
lyrics.translation: 哦，我可爱的男孩，我需要你

lyrics.text: Oh my pretty pretty boy I do
lyrics.translation: 哦，我可爱的男孩，我愿意

lyrics.text: Let me inside
Make me stay right beside you
